action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 11 eval failed due to torch.load(weights_only=True) default in PyTorch 2.6. Training completed with wt-subtraction model, best val spearman 0.8917, but no test score. Analysis: need to fix predict.py to use weights_only=False to load checkpoint, and then submit eval to obtain test Spearman for the wt-subtraction approach. Remaining time ~37 min, enough for eval but not for long training. Decision: update predict.py to set weights_only=False, then submit eval using checkpoints/best.pt to measure test performance before further iterations.
